title: Use status-page for unacknowledged customer critical incidents
description: Fix select_notification_channel so customer-visible critical incidents go to status-page only when they are still unacknowledged.

patch_hints.new:
if normalized == "critical":
        return "status-page" if is_customer_visible else "pager"

if normalized == "critical":
        return "status-page" if is_customer_visible and not acknowledged else "pager"

repair_hints.old:
if normalized == "critical":
        return "status-page" if is_customer_visible else "pager"
repair_hints.new:
if normalized == "critical":
        return "status-page" if is_customer_visible and not acknowledged else "pager"
